features: Package Includes: 1pc 70s Mens Wig + 1pc Brown Mustache + 1 pair of Retro Glasses + 1pc Wig Cap
70s Men’s Costume Wig: This is a full 70s wig for men and comes pre-styled, the short brown shaggy style wig and mustache glasses necklace 4 pcs costume set fit for so many 60s 70s 80s characters.

Get Back to the 70s 80s Theme Party: Enjoy a professional-looking hair wig that celebrates all things 70s about peace signs and disco dancing, when it comes to DIY Costumes! With 100% premium heat-resistant synthetic fiber construction, you can style the brown 80s wig with hairspray to create that authentic, 80s vintage look, and party like a rockstar!

One Size Fits All: Equipped with an adjustable rose net cap which is specially designed for men, the average cap size circumference is 22.5 inches with 2 adjustable straps, which can be intertwined to a fixed position to be suitable for most adults and teens' head sizes. Not only is it itch-free and breathable, but it fits large and small heads – and easy to adjust too!

Multi-occasions: This 70s disco wig is a perfect choice for all kinds of parties. You can rock it at Halloween parties, 70s 80s Themed Parties, Rocker Singer Cop Detective Costume, Cosplay events, or just for fun.
description: Product description Bettecos 70s 80s Costume Wigs for Men with Mustache Glasses and Chain Short Brown Shaggy Disco Wig for Rocker Singer Hippie Retro Cosplay Halloween Party Directions Includes instructions on preparing the wig, styling with heat-resistant fiber, adjusting the cap, and maintaining the wig's appearance.
